agent_outputs.raw: The evaluation is methodologically sound. The key design feature is split-before-augment with fold-local on-the-fly augmentation. No augmented image can appear in validation or test because augmentation occurs only during training-fold training passes. The part-level physical-unit clustering prevents same-unit contamination. The later-week raw test set provides temporal separation. The scope disclosure is appropriate. VERDICT: defense_wins

The aggressive augmentation policy is a design choice for handling rare defects, not evidence of contamination. Contamination would require augmented images to cross split boundaries. The pipeline prevents this by generating augmentations on the fly inside training folds only. Original-image-level splits with part-level clustering prevent original-image near-duplicate crossings. Later-week raw test provides temporal holdout. No contamination pathway exists as described. VERDICT: defense_wins

The methodological concern about oversampling in imbalanced vision tasks is real but does not apply here. The contamination risk from augmentation is eliminated by the fold-local augmentation design. The part-level grouping addresses original-image near-duplicates. The later-week test provides raw, unaugmented evaluation data from a production period after development. The scope of the claim is appropriately limited. VERDICT: defense_wins

synthesis: All three assessors unanimously find the evaluation sound. The fold-local augmentation design, original-image-level split, part-level physical-unit clustering, and later-week raw test set together prevent any leakage pathway. ETD constraint: defense wins, no dissent.
all_issues_raised: augmentation leakage concern — resolved by fold-local design and split order
scope limitation to this camera and process — correctly disclosed

empirical_test.condition: Pipeline audit confirms split-before-augment, fold-local augmentation; part audit confirms no physical-unit boundary crossing; test set confirmed as raw later-week images
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Any augmented or same-unit near-duplicate crosses split boundaries; or test images are not raw later-week production data
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: All pipeline checks pass; no boundary crossings detected; test is raw later-week data
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Core checks pass but part grouping documentation for the test week is incomplete for some part types
